creator: freebsd@signout.dk
text: Please MFC into quarterly as well since the current 3.0.1 tor-devel gives users this error "[warn] Please upgrade! This version of Tor (0.3.0.1-alpha) is not recommended, according to the directory authorities. Recommended versions are: 0.2.4.27,0.2.4.28,0.2.5.12,0.2.5.13,0.2.7.6,0.2.7.7,0.2.8.9,0.2.8.10,0.2.8.11,0.2.8.12,0.2.9.9,0.3.0.2-alpha,0.3.0.3-alpha"
